channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-22T15:02Z — 1557 outages, 33,907 customers, 996 fair-weather, 11 DC-proximate
item.description: VA-DOM: 3172 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | NC-DEP: 1742 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1337 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | VAWV-APCO: 1266 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
